info.title: AML API OAuth
info.x-explorer-description:
# Welcome to the Elliptic API Explorer

This area allows you to experiment with API requests in your browser. Browse to a request of interest and `Try it out`. If you are looking for the full documentation, head over to [the docs section](/developers/docs)

## Authentication

Authentication in this explorer is accomplished using a JWT bearer token. This will allow your logged in user to make requests to our API if permitted. API authentication does not use JWTs, please see the [auth cookbooks](https://app.elliptic.co/#section/Cookbooks/Authentication) in the documentation for instructions on how to authenticate with our API programatically.

## Environment

**Any requests made here will run against the environment you are logged in to. We advise using your sandbox environment so as not to pollute your production dataset**

tags.name: Transaction Analyses
tags.x-explorer-description: Run blockchain analysis against one or more transactions. Get and update previously run analyses.
tags.description: Run blockchain analysis against one or more transactions. Get and update previously run analyses.

tags.name: Wallet Analyses
tags.x-explorer-description: Run blockchain analysis against one or more wallets. Get and update previously run analyses.
tags.description: Run blockchain analysis against one or more wallets. Get and update previously run analyses.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description:
The customers endpoints are used to manage customers which you have associated analysis with, via the `customer_reference` analysis subject attribute.

Currently, the customers endpoints only refer to customers with [Transaction Analysis](#tag/Transaction-Analyses).

Customers with only [Wallet Analysis](#tag/Wallet-Analyses) will not yield responses from these endpoints

tags.name: Risk Rules
tags.description: Manage risk rules. Currently the same risk rules are used for Navigator and Lens

tags.name: Assets table
tags.description: See our help pages for the [full list of cryptoassets supported](https://help.elliptic.co/en/articles/3971472-cryptoasset-list).

get.summary: Get count of all transaction analyses

message.example: You do not have enough privilege to access this path.
The submitted ${type} with hash ${hash} has not yet been processed into the Elliptic tool or does not exist on the blockchain.
The submitted ${outputType} ${outputIdentifier} is not present in the outputs of transaction ${txHash}

TransactionAnalysisType.title: TransactionAnalysisType
TransactionAnalysisType.description: The type of analysis. The source_of_funds type is used to get details of the entities that have contributed funds to the transaction's source address, and calculate a risk score based on this exposure. This is referred to as "Deposit" in Navigator. The destination_of_funds type is used to get details of the entities that have received funds from the transaction's destination address, and calculate a risk score based on this exposure. This is referred to as "Withdrawal" in Navigator.

WalletAnalysisType.title: WalletAnalysisType
WalletAnalysisType.description: The type of analysis. Currently it is wallet_exposure

WalletAssertedLabel.title: WalletAssertedLabel
WalletAssertedLabel.description: An Elliptic-created, wallet asserted label to be attached to a cluster

name.description:
A real-world description of the labelled cluster, derived from the
assertions associated to this label.

category.description:
A categorical description of the real-world entity controlling the
labelled cluster

actor_id.description: Internal numeric ID of the actor

is_primary_entity.description:
A flag that shows if the entity is primary or not. Only one
in the whole array of labels

is_vasp.description: True if this entity is a Virtual Asset Service Provider, false if not, null if unknown

is_after_sanction_date.description:
True if the entity’s activity or transaction occurred after the date it was officially sanctioned,
enabling accurate time-bound sanction screening

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: an object representing a single Customer

updated_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the customer was last updated

created_at.description: Customer's creation's ISO date time with time zone (UTC)

team_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the team the user belongs to

investigator_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the user assigned to investigate customer

reference.description: used by our client to refer to this customer

labels.description: list of labels applied to the customer. If not expanded then just array of {"id":// uuid, label ids }

is_processing.description: true if a query on this customer currently processing

has_errors.description: true if a query on this customer has errored

last_queried.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the last query was run

statistics.title: CustomerStats
statistics.description: an object representing aggregated statistics for a single customer

first_tx_time.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of the transaction having the smallest transaction time

last_tx_time.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of the transaction having the biggest transaction time

avg_score.description: average between all this customer's transactions risks

max_score.description: the highest risk of this customer's transactions risks

min_score.description: the minimum risk of this customer's transactions risks

total_volume.description: sum of all customer transactions output satoshis

total_fees.description: sum of all customer transactions fees

customer_tx_count.description: total number of customer_txs that this customer has

min_output_satoshis.description: the lowest volume of this customer's transactions volumes

max_output_satoshis.description: the highest volume of this customer's transactions volumes

avg_output_satoshis.description: average of this customer's transactions volumes

TransactionAnalysisSingleResponse.title: TransactionAnalysisSingleResponse
TransactionAnalysisSingleResponse.description: Response for Transaction Analysis. Represents the full result of a transaction screening, including metadata, risk scores, contributing entities, and evaluation details.

id.description: Unique identifier of the transaction analysis

customer.description: The customer that submitted the request

id.description: The UUIDv4 of the customer this analysis is associated with

reference.description: The string reference that has been given to this customer. Can be empty

analysed_by.description: The actor who requested the analysis

created_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the analysis was first analysed

updated_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the wallet analysis was last updated

analysed_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when this analysis was completed

blockchain_info.description: The relevant blockchain data related to the subject's hash

value.description: Object representing the value of this transaction expressed in different currency units

risk_score.description: The risk score calculated as an aggregation from all the rules. If null is returned, no risk rules have been triggered. If 0 is returned, risk rules were triggered and the calculated score was 0.

evaluation_detail.description: Details of each risk rule evaluation

contributions.description: Array of contributing entities that led to the match

detected_behaviors.description: Array of detected behaviors for the analysis subject

changes.description: Changes compared to previous screening of analysis

risk_score_change.description: Change in risk score compared to previous screening of analysis. - A positive number means the risk score has increased compared to the previous screening. - A negative number means the risk score has decreased compared to the previous screening. - A 0 indicates no change in risk score compared to the previous screening.

assigned_team_user.description: The team user assigned to this analysis

team_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the team the user belongs to

process_status_id.description: The screening process status. - A 1 number means the process status is running. - A 2 number means the process status is completed. - A 3 indicates the process status has an error.

screening_source.description: Indicates whether the screening was done via the Synchronous endpoint, Asynchronous endpoint, as part of the Automatic Rescreening feature or as a fallback system rescreening in case of error

error.description: Property containing information about a failed screening, null unless process_status = 'error'

asset_list.description: A new field that will be returned for Holistic Screenings only. This field contains the asset(s) involved in the transaction using the unique combination of transaction hash and output address.

predictive.description: True if the transaction was analyzed too close to the tip of the blockchain, so the full picture of associated addresses might be incomplete.

body.description: The comment left on the analysis

analysed_by.description: the actor who requested the analysis

analysed_at.description: the timestamp of when this analysis was completed

id.description: the UUIDv4 of the customer this analysis is associated with

reference.description: the string reference that has been given to this customer

created_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the analysis was first analysed

updated_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the wallet analysis was last updated

process_status_id.description:
The screening process status.
- A 1 number means the process status is running.
- A 2 number means the process status is completed.
- A 3 indicates the process status has an error.

error.description: Property containing information about a failed screening, null unless process_status = 'error'

CustomerLabel.title: CustomerLabel
CustomerLabel.description: an object representing a label attached to a Customer

updated_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the label was last updated

created_at.description: Label's creation's ISO date time with time zone (UTC)

team_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the team the user belongs to

full_path.description: a full path to the current label e.g. "Type/Miner" (if parent name is 'Type' and this label is 'Miner')

CustomerTxInfo.title: customerTxInfo
CustomerTxInfo.description: an object representing a single analysed Transaction attached to a Customer

total_fees.description: sum of all customer transactions fees

RiskRuleEvaluation.title: RiskRuleEvaluation
RiskRuleEvaluation.description: result of a risk rule's evaluation

id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the Rule that as been evaluated

matched_entities.description: list of entities which have been trace to the transaction

items.description: UUIDv4 identifier of a trace entity

EvaluationDetail.title: EvaluationDetail
EvaluationDetail.description: Details of a single risk rule evaluation. Note: if matched_behaviors is present, matched_elements will be empty, and vice versa— rules cannot match both entities and behaviors simultaneously.

rule_id.description: The Id of the rule that triggered

rule_name.description: The name of the triggered rule

risk_score.description: The risk score calculated for this rule evaluation

matched_elements.description: Array of entities matched by this rule

matched_behaviors.description: Array of behaviors matched by this rule (mutually exclusive with matched_elements)

behavior_type.description: Type of the Behavioral pattern detected of potential suspicious activity

length.description: Length associated with the Behavior detected

usd_value.description: aggregated value (sum) associated with the behavior detected

rule_history_id.description: The unique identifier that links all versions of a risk rule

EvaluationDetailForGetAll.title: EvaluationDetailForGetAll
EvaluationDetailForGetAll.description: details of a single risk rule evaluation for paginated transactions analysis

rule_id.description: the UUIDv4 of this risk rule

risk_score.description: The risk score calculated for this rule evaluation as part of the analysis

team_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the team owning this rule

categories.description: categories on which this rule applies

items.title: SimpleCategory
items.description: A category associated to labelled entities

name.description: a real-world description of the category

entities.description: entities on which this rule applies

items.title: SimpleLabel
items.description: A single simple cluster label with name and category

name.description:
a real-world description of the labelled cluster, derived from the
assertions associated to this label

category.description:
a categorical description of the real-world entity controlling the
labelled cluster

use_for_deposits.description: whether to use this rule for deposit transaction analysis

use_for_withdrawals.description: whether to use this rule for withdrawal transaction analysis

rule_criteria.description: array of criteria applied by the rule

items.title: RiskRuleCriterion
items.description: a single risk rule criterion definition

id.description: criterion ID within a single rule

criteria_type.description: types of criteria within a single rule criterion definition

outcome.title: RiskRuleCriterionOutcome
outcome.description: range of criteria's outcome in terms of risk score

min_score.description: the value the triggered rule will assign at the lower threshold

max_score.description: the value the triggered rule will assign at the upper threshold

id.description: Team User's UUIDv4 (unique for team & user)

updated_at.description: ISO date time with time zone (UTC) of when the User was last updated

created_at.description: User's creation's ISO date time with time zone (UTC)

email.description: the email address of the User

first_name.description: the first name of the User

last_name.description: the last name of the User

WalletAnalysisResponse.title: WalletAnalysisResponse
WalletAnalysisResponse.description: Response for Wallet Analysis. Represents the full result of a holistic wallet analysis, including metadata, risk scores, and contributing entities.

id.description: Unique identifier of the wallet analysis

customer.description: The customer that submitted the request

id.description: The UUIDv4 of the customer this analysis is associated with

reference.description: The string reference that has been given to this customer. Can be empty

blockchain_info.description: The relevant blockchain data related to the subject's hash

usd.description: Transaction amount expressed in US dollars of the blockchain it has occurred in the most precise unit possible, e.g. satoshis for bitcoin

created_at.description: ISO datetime (UTC) when the analysis was first analysed

updated_at.description: ISO datetime (UTC) when the wallet analysis was last updated

analysed_at.description: ISO datetime (UTC) when this analysis was completed

analysed_by.description: The actor who executed the analysis

id.description: Team User's UUIDv4 (unique for team & user)

email.description: the email address of the User

first_name.description: the first name of the User

last_name.description: the last name of the User

type.description: Type of actor (e.g. user, system, api_key). Only present for analysed_by.

cluster_entities.description: An Elliptic-created, wallet asserted label to be attached to a cluster

team_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the team the user belongs to

risk_score.description: The risk score calculated as an aggregation from all the rules. If null is returned, no risk rules have been triggered. If 0 is returned, risk rules were triggered and the calculated score was 0.

risk_score_detail.description: Details on the risk scores of the source and destination of funds

error.description: Property containing information about a failed screening, null unless process_status = 'error'

evaluation_detail.description: Details of risk rule evaluations for both source and destination of funds

contributions.description: Array of contributions for the analysis subject retrieved

detected_behaviors.description: Array of detected behaviors for the analysis subject retrieved from the graph server

behavior_type.description: Type of the Behavioral pattern detected of potential suspicious activity

length.description: Length associated with the Behavior detected

usd_value.description: aggregated value (sum) associated with the behavior detected

changes.description: Changes compared to previous screening of analysis

risk_score_change.description: Change in risk score compared to previous screening of analysis. - A positive number means the risk score has increased. - A negative number means it has decreased. - Zero means it remained unchanged.

workflow_status.title: WorkflowStatus
workflow_status.description: The status of the analysis. "archived" is deprecated and you should use "closed" instead.

workflow_status_id.title: WorkflowStatusId
workflow_status_id.description: A number representation of the status of an analysis. "archived" is deprecated and you should use "closed" instead. - 1 = active - 2 = archived (deprecated) - 3 = escalated - 4 = closed

assigned_team_user.description: The team user assigned to this analysis

process_status_id.description: The screening process status. - 1 = running - 2 = completed - 3 = error

triggered_rules.description: risk rules which triggered against either source or destination of funds

screening_id.description: The identifier of the specific screening in the analysis

screening_source.description: Indicates whether the screening was done via the Synchronous endpoint, Asynchronous endpoint, system rescreen, or automatic rescreen.

asset.description: the asset involved in the event.

blockchain.description: The blockchain the asset/address belongs to (optional)

type.description: the type of subject. Currently, only 'transaction' is supported

output_type.description: which output type you are using to specify the output(s) you wish to analyse (BTC/LTC/BCH only)

output_address.description: the address hash when using output_type address

output_indices.description: the indices of outputs to be analysed when using output_type indices

log_index.description: the log index of an ERC20 transacation

WalletAnalysisSubject.title: WalletAnalysisSubject
WalletAnalysisSubject.description: Information describing the subject of the analysis

asset.description: The asset involved in the event

type.description: The type of subject. Currently, only 'address' is supported

hash.description: The address hash when using type 'address'

blockchain.description: The blockchain the asset/address belongs to (optional)

Contribution.title: Contribution
Contribution.description: A single contribution entry associated with an entity (holistic — only USD values included)

actor_id.description: Internal actor ID or numeric identifier that related to the identified entity

is_primary_entity.description: Whether this is the primary entity in the group (one per list)

is_vasp.description: True if VASP (Virtual Asset Service Provider), false if not, null if unknown

contribution_percentage.description: Percentage of value contributed by this entity

counterparty_percentage.description: The percentage of the total contribution that is attributed to labelled entities that are one hop away from the screened_address.

usd.description: The contribution between the screened_address and labelled entities that are one hop away, expressed in US dollars.

indirect_percentage.description: The percentage of the total contribution that is attributed to labelled entities that are more than one hop away from the screened_address.

usd.description: The contribution between the screened_address and labelled entities that are more than one hop away, expressed in US dollars.

is_screened_address.description: A boolean displaying whether the input address of a deposit or the output address of a withdrawal that is screened belongs to a labelled entity for transaction monitoring or the address that is screened belongs to a labelled entity for wallet screening

min_number_of_hops.description: Minimum number of hops between the subject and the labelled entity

MatchedElement.title: MatchedElement
MatchedElement.description: Entity or group of entities identified as contributing to the risk rule. Note: In holistic responses, values are expressed in USD only.

category.description: category of the risk rule's subject that has been triggered by one or more elements.  The name can change so advisable to use identifier for matching purposes

contribution_percentage.description: Aggregated percentage of value attributed to this matched category

contribution_value.description: Aggregated USD value attributed to this matched entity category

counterparty_percentage.description: Percentage of contribution from one-hop counterparties

indirect_percentage.description: Percentage of contribution from indirect (multi-hop) relationships

contributions.description: Array of contributing entities that led to the match

risk_triggers.description: Metadata indicating why the entity was considered risky

is_sanctioned.description: Indicates if a sanction-based risk was involved

country.description: List of country codes associated with the risk trigger

contribution_value.description: Contribution amount from this entity (USD only)

is_screened_address.description: Flag indicating whether address was directly screened

min_number_of_hops.description: Shortest path in hops to the entity

InputOutput.title: InputOutput
InputOutput.description: An input or output (IO) of a transaction

native.description: Transaction amount expresses in the native currency of the blockchain it has occurred in the most precise unit possible, e.g. satoshis for bitcoin

native_major.description: Transaction amount expressed in the native currency of the blockchain it has occurred rounded to its major decimal format

usd.description: Transaction amount expressed in US dollars of the blockchain it has occurred in the most precise unit possible, e.g. satoshis for bitcoin

index.description: The index of this IO on the transaction

labels.description: Label's given to the IO as per Elliptic Assertions

is_primary_entity.description: Is this the primary label of the entity

asset.description: For holistic screening this should be set to holistic

blockchain.description: For holistic screening this should be set to holistic

output_type.description: which output type you are using to specify the output(s) you wish to analyse

output_address.description: the address hash when using output_type address

customer_reference.description: a reference for the customer. Will create a new customer if one with a matching reference does not exist

asset.description: the asset (either BCH, ZEN or ZEC) involved in the event

blockchain.description: the blockchain (either bitcoin_cash, horizen or zcash) of the asset submitted

output_type.description: which output type you are using to specify the output(s) you wish to analyze

output_address.description: the address hash when using output_type address. In order to analyze a UTXO transaction, you must specify the output(s) of that transaction which are relevant to your analysis. For example, if you are analysing a deposit into your service then you might want to specify the output address that belongs to your service. Or for a withdrawal, it might be the output address that your customer wants to send funds to. You can either specify the address or the zero-indexed output indices. When specifying the output(s) by indices, if the indices given reference multiple distinct addresses, the API will respond with an error.

customer_reference.description: a reference for the customer. Will create a new customer if one with a matching reference does not exist

asset.description: For holistic screening this should be set to holistic

blockchain.description: For holistic screening this should be set to holistic

customer_reference.description: a reference for the customer. Will create a new customer if one with a matching reference does not exist

asset.description: the asset (either BCH, BTC (Lightning), ZEN or ZEC) involved in the event

blockchain.description: the blockchain (either bitcoin_cash, lightning, horizen or zcash) of the asset submitted

customer_reference.description: a reference for the customer. Will create a new customer if one with a matching reference does not exist

message.example: subject.asset and subject.blockchain combination not recognised

NotInBlockchain.description: Requested subject not found on the blockchain

GenericBadRequest.description: There was an error with your request

TooManyRequestsError.description: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded

schema.description: Returned when a client exceeds the allowed rate limit (HTTP 429)

message.example: Too many requests – please try again later

signature.description: (Request Time, HTTP Method, Lowercase Path, Request Payload) signed with API Secret
signature.name: x-access-sign
